links.rationale: AI agents and generation systems power adaptive worlds and avatars.
AI improves nanoscale design and process optimization.
Immersive interfaces and volumetric display stacks overlap.
Holographic projection extends social and enterprise metaverse experiences.

ath-future-tech-metaverse-overview.title: The Metaverse: Synthesis of Reality Implementations

links.rationale: VR/XR hardware and UX are core delivery surfaces for metaverse use cases.
AI drives world simulation, generation, moderation, and agent behavior.
Spatial telepresence and volumetric media increase social presence.
AI shortens materials discovery and control-loop optimization cycles.
Advanced nanomaterials can improve wearable and spatial interfaces.

ath-future-tech-vr-overview.title: Virtual Reality and Immersive Technology Overview

links.rationale: VR/XR presence is a primary metaverse interaction modality.
Both trajectories focus on spatial immersion and embodied interaction.

near-quant-agi-emergence-human-level-gen.title: AGI Emergence (Human-Level General Intelligence)
near-quant-agi-emergence-human-level-gen.description: Emergence of human-level general intelligence with systems matching broad cognitive capability across domains.

near-quant-fusion-commercialization-fore.title: Fusion Commercialization Forecast Sample
near-quant-fusion-commercialization-fore.description: Sample timeline entry showing how forecast, dependency, and leading-indicator frontmatter is ingested by TimeWeave.

links.rationale: Commercial fusion would materially expand compute capacity for large AI systems.
Better quantum tools can accelerate materials and simulation workflows.

dependencies.description: Nanofabrication and materials discovery improve magnet and reactor engineering.
Quantum simulation tools could speed up plasma and materials research.
Abundant energy expands compute budgets for frontier AI systems.

updateHistory.reason: Stronger materials and confinement signals improved the outlook
updateHistory.author: copilot

scenarioForecasts.description: Rapid progress in materials, magnets, and automation compresses the commercialization timeline.
Regulatory delays or a major technical setback pushes deployment back.
Incremental progress continues without a major breakthrough.
A paradigm shift in confinement or materials accelerates commercialization dramatically.

modelBreakdown.explanation: Baseline hazard model favors a mid-century deployment window.
Downstream gains from magnets and AI-assisted materials discovery compress the timeline.
Scenario mixture centers on the baseline with modest upside skew.
Expert priors remain cautious because commercialization still depends on multiple bottlenecks.

near-quant-molecular-assemblers-early-na.title: Molecular Assemblers (Early Nanotechnology Manufacturing)
near-quant-molecular-assemblers-early-na.description: Early molecular assembler commercialization phase introduces nanotechnology manufacturing with atomic-scale process control.

near-quant-nuclear-fusion-power-plants-c.title: Nuclear Fusion Power Plants (Commercial Operation)
near-quant-nuclear-fusion-power-plants-c.description: Commercial fusion power plants begin operation with net-positive output and grid-connected deployment.

near-quant-personal-ai-agents-autonomous.title: Personal AI Agents (Autonomous Digital Assistants)
near-quant-personal-ai-agents-autonomous.description: Personal autonomous AI agents become proactive, context-aware representatives operating across user systems and workflows.

near-quant-quantum-computing-commerciali.title: Quantum Computing Commercialization (Error-Corrected Systems)
near-quant-quantum-computing-commerciali.description: Commercialization phase for error-corrected quantum systems, transitioning from noisy prototypes to early fault-tolerant utility.

near-quant-quantum-internet-nodes-first-.title: Quantum Internet Nodes (First Intercity Links)
near-quant-quantum-internet-nodes-first-.description: First intercity quantum internet nodes establish early quantum-network infrastructure and secure entanglement-enabled communication.

near-quant-space-based-solar-power-demon.title: Space-Based Solar Power Demonstration
near-quant-space-based-solar-power-demon.description: Demonstration phase for orbital solar collection and power beaming to Earth-scale receivers.

near-quant-synthetic-biology-organisms-d.title: Synthetic Biology Organisms (Designed Life)
near-quant-synthetic-biology-organisms-d.description: Designed biological systems transition to engineered organisms created for targeted functional outcomes.

near-super-intel-artificial-wombs-ectoge.title: Artificial Wombs (Ectogenesis)
near-super-intel-artificial-wombs-ectoge.description: Artificial womb systems enable full external gestation, expanding reproductive options and reducing pregnancy-related risk.

near-super-intel-cybernetic-organisms-wi.title: Cybernetic Organisms Widespread (Bio-Digital Integration)
near-super-intel-cybernetic-organisms-wi.description: Cybernetic organisms become widespread through mature bio-digital integration across medicine, labor, and daily life.

near-super-intel-extended-lifespan-150-p.title: Extended Lifespan (150+ Years Achievable)
near-super-intel-extended-lifespan-150-p.description: Major longevity breakthroughs make lifespans of 150+ years achievable for growing portions of the population.

near-super-intel-global-brain-to-brain-c.title: Global Brain-to-Brain Communication Network (Early Trials)
near-super-intel-global-brain-to-brain-c.description: Early global trials connect participants through direct neural interfaces, enabling experimental brain-to-brain communication at scale.

near-super-intel-memory-augmentation-imp.title: Memory Augmentation Implants (Commercial)
near-super-intel-memory-augmentation-imp.description: Commercial memory augmentation implants enable direct interfaces for encoding and recall in everyday cognitive workflows.

near-super-intel-molecular-medicine-nano.title: Molecular Medicine (Nanobots in Bloodstream)
near-super-intel-molecular-medicine-nano.description: Programmable nanobots in the bloodstream enable precision intervention, real-time diagnostics, and continuous cellular-level treatment.

near-super-intel-neuromorphic-computing-.title: Neuromorphic Computing Dominates AI Infrastructure
near-super-intel-neuromorphic-computing-.description: Neuromorphic systems become dominant AI infrastructure, shifting compute from conventional accelerators to brain-like architectures.

near-super-intel-semantic-web-web-3-0-ma.title: Semantic Web (Web 3.0 Maturity - Meaning-Aware Internet)
near-super-intel-semantic-web-web-3-0-ma.description: Web 3.0 reaches semantic maturity with machine-interpretable meaning, enabling reasoning-native internet infrastructure.

near-super-intel-space-elevator-construc.title: Space Elevator Construction Begins
near-super-intel-space-elevator-construc.description: Construction begins on early space elevator infrastructure, aiming to transform access between Earth's surface and orbit.

near-super-intel-superintelligent-ai-sig.title: Superintelligent AI (Significantly Beyond Human Intelligence)
near-super-intel-superintelligent-ai-sig.description: AI systems cross into superintelligence with capabilities that significantly exceed human general cognition.

now-ai-accell-5g-networks-expand.title: 5G Networks Expand
now-ai-accell-5g-networks-expand.description: Broad 5G deployment expands high-throughput, low-latency mobile connectivity and supports real-time distributed compute applications.

now-ai-accell-alphafold-2-protein-struct.title: AlphaFold 2 Protein Structures (200M+ Predictions Released)
now-ai-accell-alphafold-2-protein-struct.description: Release of 200M+ AlphaFold-predicted protein structures marks a major expansion of AI-supported structural biology resources.

now-ai-accell-autonomous-vehicles-expand.title: Autonomous Vehicles Expand (Waymo, Tesla FSD, Cruise)
now-ai-accell-autonomous-vehicles-expand.description: Expansion of autonomous driving deployments across leading programs signals growing operational maturity in constrained urban and highway domains.

now-ai-accell-chatgpt-released-november.title: ChatGPT Released (November)
now-ai-accell-chatgpt-released-november.description: ChatGPT's release brings conversational large language models to mainstream users, rapidly reshaping expectations for natural language interfaces.

now-ai-accell-claude-sonnet-4-anthropic.title: Claude Sonnet 4 (Anthropic)
now-ai-accell-claude-sonnet-4-anthropic.description: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 4 milestone highlights expanded context handling and stronger reasoning performance for enterprise and developer workflows.

now-ai-accell-covid-19-mrna-vaccines-pfi.title: COVID-19 mRNA Vaccines (Pfizer/BioNTech, Moderna)
now-ai-accell-covid-19-mrna-vaccines-pfi.description: Emergency authorization of COVID-19 mRNA vaccines validates rapid programmable vaccine design and large-scale deployment under crisis timelines.

now-ai-accell-dall-e-text-to-image-ai.title: DALL-E (Text-to-Image AI)
now-ai-accell-dall-e-text-to-image-ai.description: DALL-E demonstrates practical text-to-image synthesis, translating natural language prompts into coherent visual outputs.

now-ai-accell-github-copilot.title: GitHub Copilot
now-ai-accell-github-copilot.description: GitHub Copilot introduces AI pair programming into mainstream software workflows, embedding generative assistance directly in code editors.

now-ai-accell-gpt-3-released-175b-parame.title: GPT-3 Released (175B Parameters)
now-ai-accell-gpt-3-released-175b-parame.description: GPT-3 scales autoregressive language modeling to 175B parameters, demonstrating strong few-shot behavior and broad API-first deployment potential.

now-ai-accell-gpt-4-released.title: GPT-4 Released
now-ai-accell-gpt-4-released.description: GPT-4 introduces stronger reasoning and multimodal capability, expanding reliable AI use across complex professional and consumer workflows.

now-ai-accell-james-webb-space-telescope.title: James Webb Space Telescope Launch
now-ai-accell-james-webb-space-telescope.description: Launch of the James Webb Space Telescope expands deep infrared observational capacity and extends visibility into the early universe.

now-ai-accell-sora-openai-video-generati.title: Sora (OpenAI Video Generation)
now-ai-accell-sora-openai-video-generati.description: Sora demonstrates high-fidelity text-to-video generation, extending generative AI from static imagery into coherent dynamic scene synthesis.

now-ai-accell-stable-diffusion-open-sour.title: Stable Diffusion (Open-Source Text-to-Image)
now-ai-accell-stable-diffusion-open-sour.description: Stable Diffusion brings open-source text-to-image generation to broad users and developers, accelerating creative AI experimentation and deployment.

now-ai-accell-volvo-crash-proof-car-conc.title: Volvo Crash-Proof Car Concepts (Radar/Sonar/Camera Fusion)
now-ai-accell-volvo-crash-proof-car-conc.description: Volvo's crash-proof concept direction emphasizes multi-sensor fusion for proactive vehicle safety and near-zero-collision operation.

now-ai-accell-xprize-avatar-robot-avatar.title: XPRIZE Avatar (Robot Avatar Competition Launched)
now-ai-accell-xprize-avatar-robot-avatar.description: The XPRIZE Avatar competition launches to accelerate systems that enable humans to project skilled physical presence through robotic embodiments.

now-ai-integration-agi-precursors-narrow.title: AGI Precursors/Narrow AGI Claims Emerge
now-ai-integration-agi-precursors-narrow.description: Claims of AGI precursors and narrow AGI emerge as models achieve broad cross-domain competence on many benchmarked cognitive tasks.

now-ai-integration-ar-glasses-mainstream.title: AR Glasses Mainstream (Apple Vision Successor, Meta)
now-ai-integration-ar-glasses-mainstream.description: Mainstream AR glasses adoption brings lightweight all-day spatial interfaces into routine work, communication, and navigation contexts.

now-ai-integration-brain-computer-interf.title: Brain-Computer Interfaces (Commercial, Neuralink-Type)
now-ai-integration-brain-computer-interf.description: Commercial brain-computer interfaces move beyond clinical pilots into consumer-facing interaction products with direct neural input pathways.

now-ai-integration-gene-therapy-becomes-.title: Gene Therapy Becomes Routine
now-ai-integration-gene-therapy-becomes-.description: Gene therapy transitions from specialized intervention to routine clinical practice across a widening set of inherited disorders.

now-ai-integration-lab-grown-organs-for-.title: Lab-Grown Organs for Transplantation
now-ai-integration-lab-grown-organs-for-.description: Engineered organ generation from patient-derived cells reaches clinical transplant readiness, reducing dependence on donor scarcity.

now-ai-integration-neuromorphic-chips-in.title: Neuromorphic Chips in Data Centers
now-ai-integration-neuromorphic-chips-in.description: Neuromorphic processors enter data-center deployments, introducing event-driven architectures that improve AI efficiency for selective inference workloads.

now-ai-integration-solid-state-batteries.title: Solid-State Batteries Commercialize
now-ai-integration-solid-state-batteries.description: Commercial solid-state batteries deliver improved energy density, charging performance, and safety characteristics compared with mainstream lithium-ion systems.

now-mobile-ai-1tb-sd-cards-available.title: 1TB SD Cards Available
now-mobile-ai-1tb-sd-cards-available.description: Availability of terabyte-class SD storage marks a major jump in portable media capacity for mobile and edge capture workflows.

now-mobile-ai-alphago-defeats-go-profess.title: AlphaGo Defeats Go Professional
now-mobile-ai-alphago-defeats-go-profess.description: AlphaGo's victory over a professional Go player demonstrates major progress in deep reinforcement learning and strategic AI decision-making.

now-mobile-ai-alphago-defeats-lee-sedol-.title: AlphaGo Defeats Lee Sedol (Go World Champion)
now-mobile-ai-alphago-defeats-lee-sedol-.description: AlphaGo's match victory over Lee Sedol demonstrates superhuman strategic performance in a complex intuition-heavy domain.

now-mobile-ai-brain-machine-interfaces-p.title: Brain-Machine Interfaces for Paralysis (BrainGate Trials)
now-mobile-ai-brain-machine-interfaces-p.description: BrainGate clinical trials advance brain-machine interfaces that translate neural signals into direct control of external assistive devices.

now-mobile-ai-crispr-cas9-gene-editing-h.title: CRISPR-Cas9 Gene Editing in Human Embryos (China)
now-mobile-ai-crispr-cas9-gene-editing-h.description: Early reported CRISPR-Cas9 editing in non-viable human embryos marks a major inflection point in applied genome engineering and bioethics discourse.

now-mobile-ai-curiosity-rover-mars-scien.title: Curiosity Rover (Mars Science Laboratory)
now-mobile-ai-curiosity-rover-mars-scien.description: Curiosity lands on Mars as a car-sized mobile laboratory, demonstrating precision sky crane delivery and long-duration surface science operations.

now-mobile-ai-deep-learning-breakthrough.title: Deep Learning Breakthrough (ImageNet, AlexNet)
now-mobile-ai-deep-learning-breakthrough.description: ImageNet results from AlexNet demonstrate that deep convolutional neural networks trained with GPU acceleration can dramatically improve vision performance.

now-mobile-ai-event-horizon-telescope-im.title: Event Horizon Telescope Images Black Hole (M87*)
now-mobile-ai-event-horizon-telescope-im.description: The Event Horizon Telescope collaboration releases the first image of a black hole shadow, marking a landmark in observational astrophysics.

now-mobile-ai-gaia-telescope-launches.title: Gaia Telescope Launches
now-mobile-ai-gaia-telescope-launches.description: ESA's Gaia mission launches to build a high-precision three-dimensional map of over a billion stars in the Milky Way.

now-mobile-ai-google-quantum-supremacy-c.title: Google Quantum Supremacy Claim (Sycamore)
now-mobile-ai-google-quantum-supremacy-c.description: Google's Sycamore result claims quantum supremacy on a specialized benchmark, intensifying debate around practical quantum advantage and measurement criteria.

now-mobile-ai-gpt-1-released-openai.title: GPT-1 Released (OpenAI)
now-mobile-ai-gpt-1-released-openai.description: OpenAI's GPT-1 demonstrates generative pre-training followed by task adaptation, helping define the modern foundation model trajectory.

now-mobile-ai-gpt-2-released.title: GPT-2 Released
now-mobile-ai-gpt-2-released.description: GPT-2 demonstrates substantially improved long-form language generation, highlighting both capability gains and misuse concerns.

now-mobile-ai-ibm-watson-wins-jeopardy.title: IBM Watson Wins Jeopardy
now-mobile-ai-ibm-watson-wins-jeopardy.description: IBM Watson's Jeopardy victory demonstrates practical large-scale question-answering and natural language understanding in a high-visibility setting.

now-mobile-ai-ipad-released.title: iPad Released
now-mobile-ai-ipad-released.description: Release of the iPad establishes the modern consumer tablet category and expands touch-first personal computing.

now-mobile-ai-iter-fusion-project-constr.title: ITER Fusion Project Construction Advances
now-mobile-ai-iter-fusion-project-constr.description: Major construction progress at ITER marks a critical systems-integration phase toward demonstrating sustained fusion power generation.

now-mobile-ai-light-peak-thunderbolt-3-1.title: Light Peak/Thunderbolt 3 (100 Gbps Capable Protocols Demonstrated)
now-mobile-ai-light-peak-thunderbolt-3-1.description: Advances in Light Peak/Thunderbolt-class interconnects and protocol demonstrations push ultra-high-speed data transfer for demanding peripheral and compute workflows.

now-mobile-ai-personal-3d-printing-consu.title: Personal 3D Printing (Consumer Models Under $1000)
now-mobile-ai-personal-3d-printing-consu.description: Consumer 3D printers below $1000 expand access to desktop fabrication for homes, classrooms, and small teams.

now-mobile-ai-portable-wound-sealing-las.title: Portable Wound-Sealing Laser Pen (Concept/Development)
now-mobile-ai-portable-wound-sealing-las.description: Concept and development of a portable wound-sealing laser pen for point-of-care tissue closure in constrained settings.

now-mobile-ai-raspberry-pi-released.title: Raspberry Pi Released
now-mobile-ai-raspberry-pi-released.description: Release of Raspberry Pi introduces an inexpensive capable computer that accelerates maker culture and practical computing education.

now-mobile-ai-siri-voice-assistant.title: Siri (Voice Assistant)
now-mobile-ai-siri-voice-assistant.description: Introduction of Siri as a built-in mobile voice assistant establishes conversational AI as a mainstream interface layer.

now-mobile-ai-solar-impulse-2-around-wor.title: Solar Impulse 2 (Around-World Solar Flight)
now-mobile-ai-solar-impulse-2-around-wor.description: Solar Impulse 2 demonstrates long-duration solar-electric aviation through a multi-stage around-the-world mission.

now-mobile-ai-transformer-architecture-p.title: Transformer Architecture Paper (Attention Is All You Need)
now-mobile-ai-transformer-architecture-p.description: The Transformer paper introduces a self-attention-first architecture that reshapes sequence modeling and accelerates modern AI progress.

now-mobile-ai-vr-headsets-oculus-rift-ht.title: VR Headsets (Oculus Rift, HTC Vive Consumer Release)
now-mobile-ai-vr-headsets-oculus-rift-ht.description: Consumer release of Oculus Rift and HTC Vive establishes modern immersive VR as a viable mainstream platform category.

now-web-cloud-4g-lte-networks-deploy.title: 4G LTE Networks Deploy
now-web-cloud-4g-lte-networks-deploy.description: Commercial deployment of 4G LTE networks establishes high-throughput, lower-latency mobile broadband for rich real-time applications.

now-web-cloud-airbnb-founded-sharing-eco.title: Airbnb Founded (Sharing Economy)
now-web-cloud-airbnb-founded-sharing-eco.description: Founding of Airbnb demonstrates platform-mediated peer services and trust mechanisms that scale the sharing economy.

now-web-cloud-android-os-htc-dream.title: Android OS (HTC Dream)
now-web-cloud-android-os-htc-dream.description: Commercial debut of Android with the HTC Dream establishes an open mobile operating system model integrated with cloud-native services.

now-web-cloud-aws-infrastructure-service.title: AWS Infrastructure Services Begin
now-web-cloud-aws-infrastructure-service.description: Amazon begins externalizing infrastructure capabilities, culminating in foundational AWS services such as SQS, S3, and EC2.

now-web-cloud-bitcoin-whitepaper-nakamot.title: Bitcoin Whitepaper (Nakamoto)
now-web-cloud-bitcoin-whitepaper-nakamot.description: Publication of the Bitcoin whitepaper proposes a decentralized digital currency secured by proof-of-work and a chained transaction ledger.

now-web-cloud-facebook-launched.title: Facebook Launched
now-web-cloud-facebook-launched.description: Launch of Facebook, advancing real-identity social networking and algorithmic feed-based engagement at global scale.

now-web-cloud-hadoop-released-open-sourc.title: Hadoop Released (Open-Source)
now-web-cloud-hadoop-released-open-sourc.description: Open-source release of Hadoop establishes a practical framework for distributed storage and large-scale data processing.

now-web-cloud-human-genome-project-compl.title: Human Genome Project Completed
now-web-cloud-human-genome-project-compl.description: Completion of the Human Genome Project delivers a reference map of human DNA and industrial-scale sequencing workflows.

now-web-cloud-iphone-released.title: iPhone Released
now-web-cloud-iphone-released.description: Release of the iPhone establishes a multi-touch, software-centric smartphone model and accelerates the shift to mobile-first internet computing.

now-web-cloud-ipod-released.title: iPod Released
now-web-cloud-ipod-released.description: Release of the iPod, combining high-capacity portable music with a tightly integrated digital ecosystem.

now-web-cloud-second-life-virtual-worlds.title: Second Life (Virtual Worlds)
now-web-cloud-second-life-virtual-worlds.description: Launch of Second Life as a persistent, user-built virtual world with a native digital economy.

now-web-cloud-twitter-launched.title: Twitter Launched
now-web-cloud-twitter-launched.description: Launch of Twitter, establishing microblogging and rapid real-time information exchange in public social networks.

now-web-cloud-wikipedia-launched.title: Wikipedia Launched
now-web-cloud-wikipedia-launched.description: Launch of Wikipedia, establishing large-scale collaborative knowledge creation on the web.

now-web-cloud-youtube-launched.title: YouTube Launched
now-web-cloud-youtube-launched.description: Launch of YouTube as a user-generated video platform that accelerates viral distribution and global creator participation.
